summary: B2B sales professional with a technical edge. Closed £400k+ in B2B revenue across high-ticket (£10k–£100k+) SaaS and fintech deals. Experienced working with founders and senior stakeholders, running effective discovery, handling objections, and driving short-cycle deals to close. Combine commercial awareness with a cybersecurity and IT degree to build trust quickly and translate technical complexity into clear commercial outcomes.

education.institution: University of the West of England
education.degree: Bachelor of Science (BSc) in Information Technology & Business Management
education.dissertation: Leveraging AI for Real-Time Threat Detection & Cybersecurity in SMEs — awarded 67 (high merit) for originality and practical application, including a working prototype for automated vulnerability scanning
education.notable: Hands-on projects in tech automation, penetration testing, and Python scripting

bullets: Prospected and closed new SME accounts through high-volume outbound (100+ dials/day), converting cold interest into committed deals
Developed structured sales conversations tailored to time-poor SME owners, cutting through noise quickly
Managed objections specific to payment switching — inertia, contract lock-in, price sensitivity — with high conversion rates
Built a consistent pipeline rhythm in a competitive, fast-paced environment with direct revenue accountability
Closed £10k–£50k+ B2B deals across inbound and self-generated pipeline, with a focus on founder and senior decision-maker conversations
Managed 5–10+ qualified calls daily, maintaining consistent close rates across a high-velocity pipeline
Ran short-cycle deals (1–2 call closes) using consultative discovery to surface pain, create urgency, and control the close
Maintained full ownership of pipeline and revenue across the sales cycle

experience.role: IT & Digital Transformation Associate (B2B Tech Sales)
bullets: Consistently exceeded quota (110–120%) by closing and supporting high-value B2B SaaS and digital transformation deals
Owned multi-stakeholder sales cycles from discovery through to close, navigating complex buying processes
Delivered tailored, multi-solution propositions, aligning commercial value to each client's priorities
Drove account growth and retention through strong client relationships and ongoing value delivery
